untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'block shopping' activity by brokers and early identification of block order inquiries - these are market microstructure events not available as technical indicators in the provided indicator set. The core signal depends on real-time broker activity detection and order flow analysis which cannot be replicated from OHLCV price/volume data alone.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy block order detection using volume surge (volume > sma_20) as a weak substitute for abnormal order flow, but this does not capture the essential broker shopping behavior described in the signal. Exit conditions use target profit (6 ticks ≈ 0.06) and stop loss (4 ticks ≈ 0.04 = 4%). The signal fundamentally requires order flow and market microstructure data that are outside the scope of standard technical indicators.
